commands.review_summary:
Refactors ClawSweeper PR review comments to use a compact `Merge readiness` section, move labels/evidence/workflow content into collapsibles, and update previous-review extraction plus renderer tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR changing review-comment rendering and extraction rather than a bug report. The relevant check is focused renderer/parser validation plus a real comment-sync proof path.
